metadata.slice_note: Discontiguous page_windows capture from the 182-page image-only GRA print of Act 896 (OCR). Page 89 carries section 115 (withholding from investment returns; window stops before section 116). Page 93 carries section 119 (final withholding payments; window starts at the "Final withholding payment" heading). Pages 118-119 carry First Schedule paragraph 8 (rates of withholding tax) from its heading through the paragraph 8(3) rate. Base section 115(1) was substituted by Act 1094 section 8 and again by Act 1134 section 3 (the operative 2026 text, in corpus under gh/statute/act-1134/...); cite the current charging text from the Act 1134 provision and only the unamended rate rows from this base paragraph 8 text.

body: &. (1) The rates of tax to be withheld from payments under Division Il of Part VIII are: fa) a payment to which section | 14 apphes fi) in the case of a resident withholdee, at the rates specified in paragraph 1{1) of this Schedule or as amended by Regulations: and (i) in the case of a non-resident withhaldee, twenty percent; fb) a payment to which section 115 applies (i) in the case of dividends, eight percent; fii) in the case of interest paid to individuals, one percent; 118 INCOME TAX ACT, 2015 Act 896 (ii) in the case of any other interest, eight percent; (iv) in the case of rent paid to an individual for residential property, eight percent; (v} in the case of rent paid to an individual for non- residential property, fifteen percent; (v1) in the case of rent paid to a person other than an individual for residential property, eight percent; {wii} in the case of rent paid to a person other than an individual for non-residential property, fifteen percent: (vill) in the case of lottery winnmgs, five percent of the amount; and (ix) in the case of natural resource payments and royalties, fifteen percent; and (¢) a payment to which section 116 applies ff) in the case of service fees referred to in section 116(1)jaXi), twenty percent; fii) in the case of service fees referred to in section 116(1yeaXin) — (vi), ten percent; fit) in the case of service fees referred to in section L16(14/), twenty percent; (fv) in the case of insurance premiums referred to in section |L6( Ly), five percent; (v} in the case of goods referred to in section 1 16(2)/a), three percent; (vet in the case of works and service fees referred to in section 116 (2)/4) five percent; full) in the case of service fees referred to in section 116 (2)(e} fifteen percent; (viti) in the case of management and technical service fees referred to in section 116(9), twenty percent; and fix) in the case of goods and works referred to in section 116(10), twenty percent. {2) The rate of tax to be withheld from a payment to which section 71(4) applies is fifteen percent of the amount. (3) The rate of tax to be withheld from a payment under section 85(2) is ten percent of the amount, 119

citation_label: Income Tax (Amendment) Act, 2016 (Act 907) — exempt interest and First Schedule substitutions
heading: Income Tax (Amendment) Act, 2016 (Act 907) — exempt interest and First Schedule substitutions

metadata.publisher: Ghana Publishing Company Limited (Assembly Press), Accra
metadata.source_authority: Parliament of the Republic of Ghana
metadata.source_note: Income Tax (Amendment) Act, 2016 (Act 907) from the Parliament of Ghana DSpace repository ORIGINAL bitstream, downloaded 2026-07-07. Text-embedded PDF (no OCR). Section 1 inserts section 7(1)(p) and (q) of Act 896 (interest paid to an individual by a resident financial institution or on Government of Ghana bonds, and unit-trust/ mutual-fund interest and dividends, exempt). Section 2 substitutes First Schedule paragraphs 8(1)(b)(viii) (lottery nil-band, later deleted by Act 956), 8(1)(c)(vii) (7.5 percent service fees) and 8(3) (three percent, later substituted by Act 1071 and removed by Act 1134). The window captures sections 1-2 and stops before section 3 (Sixth Schedule).
metadata.title: Income Tax (Amendment) Act, 2016 (Act 907) — exempt interest and First Schedule substitutions

body: The Income Tax Act, 2015 (Act 896) referred to in this Act as the “principal enactment” is amended in subsection (1) of section 7 (a) by the deletion of “and” after paragraph (n); (b) by the deletion of “.” and the insertion of “; and” after paragraph (o); and (c) by the insertion of new paragraphs (p) and (q) as follows: “(p) interest paid to an individual (i) by a resident financial institution; or (ii) on bonds issued by the Government of Ghana; and “(q) the interest or dividend paid or credited to a holder or member on an investment in an approved unit trust scheme or mutual fund is exempt”.
citation_label: Income Tax (Amendment) Act, 2016 (Act 907) — exempt interest and First Schedule substitutions 1
heading: section-7-exempt-interest-inserted Section 7 of Act 896 amended

body: The principal enactment is amended in the First Schedule by the substitution for 3 (a) paragraph 8(1) (b) (viii) of “(viii) in the case of lottery winning: (i) First 2,592 — Nil (ii) Exceeding 2,592 — 5 percent;”; Percent.’ (b) paragraph (8)(1)(c)(vii) of “(vii) in the case of service fees referred to in section 116(2) (c), 7.5 percent;”; and (c) paragraph (8)(3) of “(3) The rate of tax to be withheld from a payment under section 85(2) is three percent of the amount.”.
